zh.Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德
zh.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hasculf Musard於大約1070年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，他的父親Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes32歲，母親Belanne de Keddington28歲。他和Matilda de Richmond至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1133年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德
zh-hans.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hasculf Musard于大约1070年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，他的父亲Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes32岁，母亲Belanne de Keddington28岁。他和Matilda de Richmond至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1133年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Musard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Durham): nickname or occupational name from Middle English mustard ‘mustard’ (Old French mostarde). The allusion could perhaps be to someone with a sharp tongue, but is probably usually to a dealer in mustard.

en.lifeSummary: When Hasculf Musard was born about 1070, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, was 32 and his mother, Belanne de Keddington, was 28. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Matilda de Richmond. He died before 1133, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hasculf Musard est né environ 1070, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Belanne de Keddington, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Matilda de Richmond. Il est décédé avant 1133, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hasculf Musard um 1070 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes 32 und seine Mutter Belanne de Keddington 28. Er hatte mit Matilda de Richmond mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1133 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hasculf Musard è nato il circa 1070 nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Belanne de Keddington, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Matilda de Richmond. Morì prima del 1133, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Hasculf Musardが約1070年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantesは32歳，母Belanne de Keddingtonは28歳であった。彼はMatilda de Richmondとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1133年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hasculf Musard(이)가 대략 1070년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Belanne de Keddington(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Matilda de Richmond(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1133년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: Tideswell, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hasculf Musard nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Belanne de Keddington, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Matilda de Richmond. Ele faleceu antes 1133, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hasculf Musard родился около 1070 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Belanne de Keddington, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Matilda de Richmond. Он умер перед 1133 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hasculf Musard nació aproximadamente 1070, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Belanne de Keddington, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Matilda de Richmond. Murió antes de 1133, en su pueblo.
